content.text:
The file /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4 has been edited. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of /workspace/YatCC/task/2/antlr/SYsUParser.g4:
     1	parser grammar SYsUParser;
     2	
     3	options {
     4	  tokenVocab=SYsULexer;
     5	}
     6	
     7	primaryExpression
     8	    :   Identifier
     9	    |   Constant
    10	    ;
    11	
    12	postfixExpression
    13	    :   primaryExpression  
    14	    ;
    15	
    16	unaryExpression
    17	    :   postfixExpression
    18	    |   unaryOperator unaryExpression
    19	    |   Exclaim unaryExpression
    20	    ;
    21	
    22	unaryOperator
    23	    :   Plus | Minus
    24	    ;
    25	
    26	additiveExpression
    27	    :   unaryExpression ((Plus|Minus) unaryExpression)*
    28	    ;
    29	
    30	assignmentExpression
    31	    :   additiveExpression
    32	    |   unaryExpression Equal assignmentExpression
    33	    ;
    34	
    35	expression
    36	    :   assignmentExpression (Comma assignmentExpression)*
    37	    ;
    38	
    39	
    40	declaration
    41	    :   declarationSpecifiers initDeclaratorList? Semi
    42	
Review the changes and make sure they are as expected. Edit the file again if necessary.
